The script discounts each semi-annual coupon and the face value back from each period. Modified duration divides Macaulay by 1 plus the semi-annual yield. Price at 5% is $707, at 6...

beats.text: Beat B03 in reel bond-duration-pricer is missing its Remotion animation. The concept — The script discounts each semi-annual coupon and the face value back from each period.
